modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Signature pads not connecting to Windows 10 computers

full_description_text:  
The signature pads in the clinic are not recognized by the computers. This issue is affecting the ability to access the scanner in Adobe Acrobat 2017. Users are experiencing connection problems that need immediate attention.
short_description: Signature pads not connecting to Windows 10 computers
description: The signature pads in the clinic are not recognized by the computers. This issue is affecting the ability to access the scanner in Adobe Acrobat 2017. Users are experiencing connection problems that need immediate attention.
